Location.description: The point in space for the location of the object. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

MechanicalEquipmentType.description: A type which describes the mechanical equipment more specifically whether it's an air handling unit, fan coil unit, boiler or chiller. MechanicalEquipmentType: A type of mechanical equipment (air handling unit, boiler, chiller, fan coil unit.)

Parts.description: A collection of the parts (Air Handling Unit, Fans, Coils, Energy Wheel, Filters, Electrical Connectors) that make up the Air Handling Unit

FlowRate.description: The primary volume of fluid being conveyed by the mechanical equipment per second (m3/s). For an air handling unit it would be the largest air volume (supply air for example.) Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate measured in [m³/s].

Power.description: The power of the mechanical equipment described in kilowatts.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
